namespace.description: Values for the Namespace being created

namespaceName.description: Name of the Namespace being created. Must match the format: <product>-<env>-ns-<purpose>
namespaceName.title: Namespace name

projectName.description: Name of the project the Namespace is created in
projectName.title: Project name

clusterName.description: Name of the Alauda cluster the Namespace is created in
clusterName.title: Alauda cluster name

displayName.description: Display name of the Namespace resource
displayName.title: Namespace display name

creator.description: Namespace creator (annotation cpaas.io/creator). On order from the console console is substituted
creator.title: Creator

role.description: Namespace role. When selected the namespace-role label is set
role.title: Namespace role

annotations.description: Dictionary of annotations for the Namespace resource
annotations.title: Annotations

labels.description: Dictionary of labels for the Namespace resource
labels.title: Labels

namespace.title: Namespace

serviceMesh.description: Integration with Service Mesh (Istio ambient). Enabled at the environment level. When enabled=true the Namespace gets Istio labels (istio-discovery, istio.io/dataplane-mode=ambient) and the networking.k8s.io/enable-netpol annotation

enabled.description: Enable Service Mesh for the Namespace
enabled.title: Service Mesh

serviceMesh.title: Service Mesh

resourceQuotas.description: Values for resource quotas of the Namespace being created

limits.description: Resource limits for the Namespace being created

cpu.description: CPU limit for the Namespace being created
cpu.title: CPU limit

memory.description: Memory limit for the Namespace being created
memory.title: Memory limit

limits.title: Resource limits

podsAmount.description: Maximum number of pods in the Namespace. Limited by the subnet mask
podsAmount.title: Pod count

requests.description: Resource requests for the Namespace being created

cpu.description: CPU request for the Namespace being created
cpu.title: CPU request

memory.description: Memory request for the Namespace being created
memory.title: Memory request

requests.title: Resource requests

storage.description: Block storage quotas for the Namespace being created

storages.description: Dictionary of block storage quotas. Must match the format: $StorageClass: $Quota
storages.title: Block storage quotas

storage.title: Block storage quotas

resourceQuotas.title: Resource quotas

subnet.description: Values for subnets of the Namespace being created. At least one subnet must be created. Multiple subnets are allowed

enable.description: Service field, controls creation of the Subnet resource. Enable only when the CIDR block is guaranteed to be reserved in Netbox
enable.title: Enable

subnets.description: List of subnets for the Namespace being created

name.description: Subnet name. Must match the format: <product>-<env>-ns-<purpose>
name.title: Subnet name

allowSubnets.description: List of allowed subnets that require network connectivity with this subnet
allowSubnets.title: Allowed subnets

excludeIps.description: List of reserved IP addresses that must not be handed out to pods in the Namespace being created. The gateway IP is added automatically
excludeIps.title: Reserved IP addresses

subnets.title: Subnets

subnet.title: Namespace subnets
